digest_method: sha256 over canonical JSON of the `vectors` array: json.dumps(doc['vectors'], sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':')) encoded utf-8 (NOT the SHA of the vectors.json file bytes)

families.base: minimal vectors that define each axis
families.ca_: coding-agent vectors that exercise each axis on file/command/tool/network/pack evidence
coverage-honesty vectors that exercise declared-case pass/fail/not-run/error/missing-result semantics

external_reproduction.result: 60/60 vectors reproduced; all eleven axes pass

non_claims: This manifest attests the provenance and content-address of the spec-owned vector SET only. It is NOT a claim about any agent's behavior, safety, or compliance. The current digest has one reported independent reproduction by a different author/org; future vector changes require fresh reproduction under the new digest. The vectors are spec-owned and independently producible: any program that emits the same canonical bytes yields the same digest, so no single generator is the required path.
